summary:
The investigation that is not recommended by best practices as an initial approach due to its time-consuming nature and less immediate utility compared to other faster tests available during Day 3 of symptoms onset includes virus isolation or direct cell-culture technique such as \(A\) among options provided; thus it should exclude any option involving prolonged testing times which delay treatment initiation crucially needed with Dengue fever management strategies focusing heavily upon prompt action based on reliable yet quick assays instead.
